Class Http2ClientFeignConfiguration

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.clientconfig.Http2ClientFeignConfiguration
@Configuration(proxyBeanMethods=false) @ConditionalOnMissingBean(HttpClient.class) public class Http2ClientFeignConfiguration extends Object
Default configuration for HttpClient.
Author:
changjin wei(魏昌进), Luis Duarte
